episodes.title: The Brief
episodes.description: The mandate was simple: build a car ordinary people could afford to dream about. Nothing about it was simple.

episodes.title: The Prototype
episodes.description: Early clay models and running prototypes reveal just how far the original brief got bent along the way.

episodes.title: The Fight
episodes.description: Internal politics, budget wars, and a last-minute executive intervention almost killed the car twice.

episodes.title: The Legend
episodes.description: Fifty years of the car that reshaped what Americans thought they could own — and where it goes from here.

extras.title: The Archive Footage
extras.description: Never-before-seen footage from Ford's own archives, covering the first prototype runs.

extras.title: Original Owners
extras.description: Five people who bought the car new in 1964 — and still have it.

extras.title: Extended Interview: The Engineers
extras.description: Full interviews with surviving engineers from the original program.
